overall.description: A slow, atmospheric pan across a cozy, rustic study or attic room with wooden walls, a lit cast-iron stove, and vintage furniture. The scene is clearly rendered in a game engine with cinematic lighting, suggesting a narrative exploration game.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic study corner with wood stove and library

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the room, examining the cozy study area with the lit stove and bookshelves

entered.detail: black cast-iron wood stove with glowing fire inside and stovepipe extending upward
neatly stacked logs of firewood beside the stove
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books reaching to the ceiling
large ornate red and beige patterned area rug covering the wooden floor
classic green glass banker's lamp illuminated on a desk
upholstered armchair with wooden frame and matching footstool
window with heavy curtains showing dark night outside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cozy, dimly lit study corner featuring a glowing cast-iron stove with a stack of firewood beside it. A tall wooden bookshelf filled with volumes dominates the center view, while a green banker's lamp illuminates a desk and vintage armchair in the background. The warm artificial lighting creates an intimate, rustic atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: reading nook with desk and armchair

events.description: camera pans past the wood stove, shifting focus to the desk and armchair area

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, revealing the desk area and the right side of the room with shelves

entered.detail: wooden writing desk with books and papers under the green lamp
round upholstered footstool in front of the armchair
wooden shelves mounted on the wall holding various items and boxes
tall rectangular mirror with blue frame leaning against the wall
large wicker basket on the floor near the shelves

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans past the stove, the focus shifts to a comfortable reading nook centered around a vintage armchair and wooden desk. The green banker's lamp provides a warm glow over the workspace. Wall shelves and a mirror come into view on the right side, revealing more of the room's lived-in, cluttered character.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage area with shelves and exit doorway

events.description: wooden doorway with warm light becomes visible, indicating a passage to another room

agents.ego_description: completing the pan across the room, focusing on the storage shelves and the doorway leading out

entered.detail: wooden door frame leading to another room with warm light emanating from within
stacked cardboard boxes and containers near the doorway
smaller patterned rug near the doorway entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the rightmost area of the room, dominated by wall-mounted storage shelves holding various household items. A wooden doorway bathed in warm light suggests an exit to another part of the house. The camera completes its survey of the cozy, cluttered space, having moved from the stove area across to the storage and exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan across a rustic, dimly lit study that transitions from a cozy heating area to a lived-in workspace and finally toward a sunlit exit. It begins focused on a glowing cast-iron stove and a stack of firewood, with a tall wooden bookshelf dominating the center view. As the camera glides past the stove, the scene opens into a reading nook where a green banker's lamp casts a warm glow over a vintage armchair and a cluttered wooden desk. The perspective then shifts toward the right side of the room, revealing wall shelves and a mirror that emphasize the space's inhabited character. Finally, the movement concludes by uncovering wall-mounted storage and a wooden doorway bathed in warm light, suggesting a path leading further into the house.
